news.title: SpaceX sets earnings date, triggering first lock-up expiration for millions of shares
news.summary: SpaceX's stock gained on Tuesday and looked to snap a seven-day losing streak. The company announced Aug. 4 as its maiden earnings report.

news.title: Greer hints new Trump tariffs coming on dozens of countries: 'Expect action soon'
news.summary: The Trump administration could impose new tariffs just as other duties are set to expire. U.S. Trade Representative Jamieson Greer's comments were made in an interview with CNN.

news.title: U.S. strikes Iran and Houthis threaten Saudi Arabia shipping as mediators push 10-day ceasefire
news.summary: The latest cycle of strikes comes amid reports that regional mediators have presented Washington and Tehran with a proposal for a 10-day ceasefire.

news.title: Novo Nordisk sues Eli Lilly, alleging misleading GLP-1 advertising
news.summary: Novo asked the court to permanently stop Lilly from running the "deceptive" ads. Novo also asked the drugmaker to issue corrective advertising.

news.title: Bessent says U.S. could sanction China over AI model 'theft'
news.summary: Chinese open-weight models are gaining steam against leading offerings from U.S. companies. OpenAI and Anthropic are among the companies offering open-weights in China.

news.title: Why Paramount could win if it loses the Warner Bros. Discovery deal
news.summary: States are trying to block Paramount’s mega-merger. Shareholders should root for them, writes CNN.com's John Sutter.

news.title: Tesla earnings are on deck, and investors will be looking to settle this major debate
news.summary: Wall Street wants to see whether Tesla can deliver on its robotaxi and Optimus plans. Tesla's robotaxis and Optimus cars are expected to go on sale in 2015.

news.title: ‘I have a $2,000 deductible’: I reported a cracked windshield on my Hertz rental car. Can they charge me?
news.summary: “I never heard a rock hit the windshield,” he says. “I’m just glad I didn’t get hit.”

news.title: Do I use $300,000 of my $1.2 million retirement savings so my daughter can attend her dream college?
news.summary: "Our daughter is a highly ranked competitive softball pitcher with a 3.94 GPA," the family said in a statement. "We are proud to have her as our daughter," they said.

news.title: The co-founder of Stocktwits dumped chip stocks before their 20% slide. Where he’s putting his money now.
news.summary: Stocktwits’ Howard Lindzon talks to MarketWatch about sidestepping a chip selloff. Lindzon sees opportunity and the “degenerate economy.”
